title: Cart (Redis Lua) + Orders + YooMoney webhook
description: Full checkout flow: Redis cart with Lua atomic reservation -> create order -> YooMoney payment link -> HMAC webhook -> status PAID -> Celery notify.

cart.fields: Cart(id, user_id nullable, session_id nullable, created_at, updated_at) + CartItem(id, cart_id, variant_id, quantity CHECK>0, reserved_until nullable)

cart_service.lua_script: atomic add_to_cart: INCR quantity + check stock reservation atomically

checkout_flow: 6. Celery Beat: release reservation if no payment after 30min

webhook_contract.on_success: Order.status = PAID -> release stock -> Celery notify_order_paid

contracts: Lua script for reservation — no plain DECR
HMAC checked FIRST before any logic
No payment_id + amount in single log line (152-FZ)
acceptance_criteria: Add to cart — atomic Lua, no race condition
Webhook invalid HMAC -> 400, no logic executed
Webhook idempotent — duplicate call no duplicate processing
Status PENDING -> PAID after valid webhook
Reservation released by Celery Beat after 30min without payment
